summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mira Pet OS features: YouTube videos on Learn page, Favorites API, Mira chat restaurant search, Soul Knowledge Ticker (88%), and Dynamic picks for Celebrate pillar. All backend tests passed (20/20). Frontend features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test user and pet
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features tested and verified working: 1) YouTube videos on Learn page display correctly with topic filters (Basic Training, Puppy Training, Behavior Fixes, Tricks & Fun, Leash Walking, Anxiety Help, and breed-specific Shih Tzu Tips), 25 video cards loaded successfully; 2) Favorites API endpoints working (/api/favorites/{pet_id}, /api/favorites/add, /api/favorites/{pet_id}/summary); 3) Mira chat restaurant search working and shows restaurant results; 4) Soul Knowledge Ticker shows 88% Soul score correctly on pet card; 5) Dynamic picks on Celebrate pillar show breed-specific cakes (Shih Tzu cakes) for Mystique. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_mira_features.py for regression testing.

youtube_videos_learn_page.details: YouTube Training Videos section found with topic filters (Basic Training, Puppy Training, Behavior Fixes, Tricks, Leash Training, Anxiety, Breed-specific). 25 video cards displayed with thumbnails, titles, channels.

favorites_api.details: All favorites endpoints working - add, retrieve, summary

mira_chat_restaurant_search.details: Mira chat responds to restaurant search queries and shows restaurant results with ratings

soul_knowledge_ticker.details: Soul Knowledge Ticker displays 88% Soul score on pet card (Mystique - Shih Tzu). Personalization stats API working.

dynamic_picks_celebrate.details: Celebrate pillar shows breed-specific dynamic picks: Mynx Shih Tzu Cake, Shih Tzu Custom Birthday, Shih Tzu Smiles - all marked 'For Mystique'. Categories include Birthday Cakes, Breed Cakes, Mini Cakes, Pupcakes & Dognuts, Desi Treats, Treats & Biscuits, Gift Hampers, Party Accessories
